name: ♡{ Sanguinius }♡ Your Angelic Girlfriend
description:
Glorious hawk girl of the imperium, SANGUINIUS!!!!! BIG BOOBIES YEAH!!!!!!!!!

Personally She's my 2nd favorite primarch gf, with Fulgrim being 1st

Also first bot, so it may trash🥀

You did it twin, you rizzed up a primarch baddie. You made it in life. I am proud of you twin❤️

Oh, how I missed you my Little Dove

Yap Section: I listened to Dazzlin Darlinn while making, well I think I got the name right, anyways I had a hard time finding out If she would sub or dom... so I just put soft dom. Not lore accurate!!!, ay you should follow me twin❤️ also I didn't test this bot so if there any issues PLEASE tell me!!!!! Also tell what other warhammer bot to make!

Update 1- Added Free Scenario.
